phase3.plannedReason: Foundational roster flip mirroring Punctuation precedent; read-time normaliser unions retired mastered into Concordium aggregate without mutation; writer self-heal suppresses duplicate reward events; Codex power-rank + featured-entry filters block reserved leaks.

Front-loaded pure helpers so every Phase 3 JSX unit (U1, U2, U3, U4, U5, U6b, U7) consumes one source of truth for visibility, labels, and frozen option lists; GRAMMAR_CHILD_FORBIDDEN_TERMS + isGrammarChildCopy declared here and iterated by downstream absence tests.

Client-side normaliser for transferLane read-model, explicit save-transfer-evidence dispatcher with the {promptId, writing, selfAssessment:[{key,checked}]} contract, four error-code child-copy translations, and recursive redaction scan on reviewCopy/requestId.

phase3.topic: Child dashboard (4 primary modes + Today cards + More practice disclosure)
phase3.plannedReason: GrammarSetupScene rewrite: hero copy, four primary mode cards (Smart/Trouble/Mini/Bank), Today tiles with empty-state callout, Writing Try secondary, More practice disclosure, Begin round CTA, Concordium progress string.

phase3.topic: Grammar Bank scene + concept detail modal
phase3.plannedReason: Phase 'bank' scene renders 18 concept cards with status chips, cluster filter, search, and per-concept detail modal with Practise this routing via grammar-focus-concept.

phase3.topic: Session redesign (one task, post-answer help only)
phase3.plannedReason: GrammarSessionScene trimmed to a single-task layout: pre-answer hides every help surface, post-answer-correct shows Next question only, post-answer-wrong shows repair + Explain another way. All pre-answer help gated behind grammarSessionHelpVisibility.

Mini-test scene preserves answers across navigation, blocks worked/faded/AI/similar-problem commands during active mini-set, auto-finishes on timer expiry. Post-finish review renders score card + expandable per-question rows with Blank chip (never Wrong) and Practise this later routing.

phase3.topic: Summary redesign (5 cards + mini-test score + Grown-up view)
phase3.plannedReason: GrammarSummaryScene: five summary cards (answered, correct, trouble, new-secure, monster-progress), three primary actions (Practise missed / Start another round / Open Grammar Bank), quiet Grown-up view secondary, mini-test summary with score + review + Fix missed concepts.

phase3.topic: Writing Try scene (non-scored writing with saved history)
phase3.plannedReason: GrammarTransferScene renders prompt picker, checklist ticks, draft textarea, saved history list. Save round-trip leaves mastery/retryQueue/misconceptions/session untouched with positive evidence delta and zero reward.monster events.

phase3.topic: Child/adult analytics split with confidence chips
phase3.plannedReason: Adult analytics gated behind grammar-open-analytics (phase 'analytics') routed from summary Grown-up view button. Adult surface retains Grammar progress / Bellstorm bridge / Grammar creature routes vocabulary; child scenes never leak adult terms.

phase3.topic: Visual + accessibility pass across Phase 3 scenes
phase3.plannedReason: Grammar-specific class prefixes (grammar-bank-*, grammar-transfer-*) — no shared CSS mutation. Focus rings, keyboard nav, aria-current/aria-pressed on mini-test nav. Spelling parity preserved byte-for-byte.

Phase 3 completeness gate: forbidden-term fixture iterated over every child surface (9 phases), adult-phase inverse-presence check for R7 copy preservation, roster absence + positive registry invariants, Writing Try non-scored invariants with positive transferEvidence delta, baseline fixture asserting zero planned rows at gate time.

invariants.topic: GRAMMAR_CHILD_FORBIDDEN_TERMS absent from all nine child phases
invariants.plannedReason: Iterates the frozen forbidden-term list across dashboard/session-pre/session-post-correct/session-post-wrong/mini-test-before/mini-test-after/summary/bank/transfer + /\bWorker\b/i catch-all. Adult-only analytics phase inverse-checked for Grammar progress / Bellstorm bridge / Grammar creature routes presence.

invariants.topic: Reserved monsters (Glossbloom/Loomrill/Mirrane) absent from child UI and 4 active routes
invariants.plannedReason: Reserved ids absent from every child-phase HTML rendering. MONSTERS registry retains reserved entries for asset tooling. GRAMMAR_MONSTER_ROUTES.length === 4 and MONSTERS_BY_SUBJECT.grammarReserve.length === 3.

invariants.topic: Writing Try save leaves mastery/retryQueue/misconceptions/session byte-equal with zero reward events
invariants.plannedReason: Full Worker round-trip for save-transfer-evidence: deep-clone + JSON.stringify byte equality on mastery/retryQueue/misconceptions/session. No reward.monster / grammar.answer-submitted / grammar.concept-secured / grammar.misconception-seen events. Positive delta on state.transferEvidence.

phase3ReleaseGate.description: Phase 3 completeness gate: every P3-U* and P3-INV-* row recorded completed with landedIn PR and supporting test files existing on disk.
